name: Savills plc
description: Savills plc is a leading global real estate services provider listed on the London Stock Exchange. Headquartered in the United Kingdom, the company operates an extensive network of offices across Europe, Asia Pacific, North America, Africa, and the Middle East. Savills offers a comprehensive range of professional services, including transaction advisory, property consultancy, investment management, and facilities management. Serving a diverse client base, the firm provides expert guidance on residential, commercial, and agricultural property, leveraging deep market insights to deliver tailored solutions for investors, developers, and occupiers worldwide.
